title: Picture-Based Participatory Linguistics Cards
description:
This is a template to build your own picture-based cards for participatory phonological analysis through word-sorting activities in orthography development workshops. The cards build on Kutsch Lojenga’s (2024) word-based participatory approach, aiming to empower language communities in their orthography development and literacy efforts.

Reference:
Kutsch Lojenga, C. (2024). 9: Participatory research in linguistics for language and orthography development: A practical guide. In T. Stirtz, M. Cahill, & P. Davison (Eds.), Participatory linguistics: Methods and case studies from around the world. Language Documentation & Conservation Special Publication no. 29 (pp. 136–158). University of Hawai’i Press; https://nflrc.hawaii.edu/ldc/. https://hdl.handle.net/10125/74780
